title: Panda's Brilliant Journey
description: PBJ is a 1.21.5 vanilla+ pack focused on enhancing exploration through new world generation, structures and mobs.
body:
![Panda's Brilliant Journey](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dcf9e4ca470494d18b21cf6491983eb39166d397_0.webp)

![The Goal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/14360d0c5ce1b97d6e8b4093caaf2d7246f125a3.png)

This pack was created primarily to host a small group of friends who love vanilla Minecraft but wanted a little bit more. Subject to frequent (and sometimes stretches of dormancy) content and balance adjustments to suit our taste. You are welcome to use it as is or make a fork if you like what it has at its core.


![Key Mods](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0600ac6ba87e41037a6317d894140f7dfa396db1.png)

**[Tectonic](https://modrinth.com/datapack/tectonic):** Creates more realistic feeling terrain while adding a touch of the fantastic. Adjustments have been made, increasing mountain height to around 360 blocks high. This adds scale without tanking chunk loading. The build height has also been doubled. 

**[William Wythers' Overhauled Overworld](https://modrinth.com/datapack/terralith):** Hundreds of new biomes that use vanilla blocks. Some biomes have been removed, but this can be adjusted to preference with the Biome Replacer config.

**[Terralith](https://modrinth.com/datapack/william-wythers-overhauled-overworld-(datapack)):** Overhauls vanilla biomes without adding any new blocks to increase their diversity and scale dramatically.

**[Wilder Wild](https://modrinth.com/mod/wilder-wild):** Adds several vanilla-style biomes, mobs and terrain tweaks that blend well with WWOO.

**[Enderscape](https://modrinth.com/mod/enderscape):** New End Biomes and overhauled generation.

**[Incendium](https://modrinth.com/datapack/incendium):** Ampifies Nether generation while adding some more Biomes.

**[Distant Horizons](https://modrinth.com/mod/distanthorizons):** Greatly increases view distance without a large impact on performance by introducing a LOD system _(honestly, how is this not a vanilla feature?)_

**[Living Things](https://modrinth.com/mod/living-things):** Adds several real-world animals and has been manually configured to work with Terralith.

**[Dungeons and Taverns Series](https://modrinth.com/user/NovaWostra):** Most of the DnT structure mods have been included.

**[Towns and Towers](https://modrinth.com/mod/towns-and-towers):** Adds much improved variety to villages and pillager outposts.

**A collection of animal and mob additions:** From animals like bears and deer to a more diverse cast of enemy mobs!

**And more!**

![PBJ Canyon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1b1cc7b22e622c65878ddab51a4194a6653934cc_0.webp)
